generic_rules: Focus repairs on fixing AGREE syntax errors reported by the validator.
Prioritize repairs that address unresolved identifiers or type mismatches.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure correct data types (int, real, bool) are used in AGREE declarations.
Helper declarations (eq, const) must have valid types matching their expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new AADL elements (features, types) as part of a repair.
Avoid adding architecture to resolve AGREE errors; focus on expression correction.
Do not attempt to place guarantees in implementation annexes.
